title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
